title: myosotis palustris var. repens
intro: Myosotis palustris var. repens, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a low-growing, spreading variety of the forget-me-not plant, native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its tiny blue flowers and delicate foliage. The medicinal properties of Myosotis palustris var. repens include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular remedy in traditional herbal medicine. Myosotis palustris var. repens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
